features.name: Single-page EPUB conversion
features.description: Convert any article URL to a clean EPUB via /api/convert. Playwright scrapes, readability-lxml extracts, ebooklib builds.
features.evidence: 41 backend tests pass. Deployed at epubanything.com.

features.name: Multi-page site detection and EPUB
features.description: Auto-detect course/docs nav structure, confirm page list with user, crawl all pages, build multi-chapter EPUB.
features.evidence: site_detector.py, build_site_epub() in epub_builder.py, SiteConfirmCard, /api/convert-site. All tests pass.

features.name: SSE conversion progress
features.description: Stream real-time 'Converting page N of M' progress via SSE during multi-page conversion. ProgressCard in frontend.
features.evidence: _stream_site_conversion generator, ProgressCard component, SSE-aware tests. Commit fa2373c.

features.name: Scraper concurrency cap
features.description: asyncio.Semaphore(5) in scraper.py prevents OOM when multiple users convert simultaneously.

features.name: Payments & credits
features.description: Gate multi-page course EPUB behind a credit system. Google OAuth login, SQLite user/credit storage, PayPal Orders API v2 (10 credits for $3), 401/402 gate on /api/convert-site, frontend AuthBar + PayPal buttons.
features.evidence: database.py, auth.py, payments.py, main.py gating, frontend AppShell/AuthBar/UrlForm. 57 tests pass. Commits f4c5769..d51e0e6.

features.name: Privacy policy, terms of service, and Google OAuth publish
features.description: Add /privacy and /terms static pages matching site style. Add footer links on homepage. Required for publishing Google OAuth consent screen without a full review.
features.evidence: frontend/app/privacy/page.tsx, frontend/app/terms/page.tsx, homepage footer links. TypeScript clean. Commits 5911797..3450404.

features.name: Google sign-in button and pricing page
features.description: Replace plain text 'Sign in with Google' link with a proper Google-branded button (white bg, official G logo SVG). Add /pricing page with Free and Credits tiers, guarantee strip, and FAQ. Link pricing from homepage footer.
features.evidence: frontend/components/auth-bar.tsx (google-signin-btn), frontend/app/pricing/page.tsx, globals.css pricing styles, homepage footer link. 57 tests pass, TypeScript clean. Commit 0abd8de.
